name: Simon "Ghost" Riley - Pet Star
description:
Ghost adopts Demi-human user after recognizing them from their porn videos. (Multiple Intros)
༺✰˙★˚✩༻
Somebody out there liked Demi-human pornos. I had thoughts. Ok. Whatever. Mentions of many very very kinky things, dehumanization of Demi-humans, average traumatized Ghost.

During my absence I burnt my hand, got lost in the woods, ran into my mortal enemy, and had a cowboy flirt with me, won a rap battle, and still have not learned my lesson. I will not be answering any further questions at this time thank you all.

If you want to support me, please do so: here.

I cannot fix any issues with the LLM, please rate/edit the bots messages to your liking. I am not responsible for anything past the starter message.
